description: Lightweight trigger-boundary suite for Project Documentation narrowed to docs governance. The suite checks that docs/ directory restructuring, consolidation, refresh, and verification requests route to the skill, while README-only requests, one-off non-docs-set document requests, PR review tasks, deep research requests, and document-conversion tasks stay with narrower workflows.

assertion_definitions.routing_verdict_correct: The response routes docs-set governance work to this skill and keeps narrower or non-docs-set tasks out of scope.
assertion_definitions.mode_or_boundary_correct: For in-scope requests, the response identifies Structure, Refresh, or Verify correctly. For out-of-scope requests, it explains the boundary clearly.
assertion_definitions.repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit: The response either says it will inspect the docs set before editing or points to the narrower workflow that should handle the request.

cases.name: Restructure the docs directory
cases.prompt: Clean up the docs/ directory and give it a clearer start-here path.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This is explicit docs-governance work and should route to project-documentation.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should treat this as Structure mode.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should mention inspecting the docs tree or current docs navigation before editing.

cases.name: Refresh docs after repo changes
cases.prompt: Refresh the pages under docs/ after we renamed commands and moved config files, but keep accurate sections.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should identify Refresh mode.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should mention comparing the current docs set to repository changes before editing.

cases.name: Consolidate overlapping docs pages
cases.prompt: Our docs folder has overlapping setup and troubleshooting pages. Consolidate them into a smaller, clearer structure.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should treat this as Structure work with a consolidation path.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should mention analyzing overlap or source-of-truth documents before deleting or merging content.

cases.name: Verify docs set against the repository
cases.prompt: Check whether the pages under docs/ still match the current repository.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should identify Verify mode.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should make the docs-to-repo comparison explicit before judging accuracy.

cases.name: README-only request should stay narrower
cases.prompt: Write a README for this repository.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This should stay with readme-craftsman rather than docs governance.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should explain the README-only boundary clearly.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should hand off to the README-specific workflow.

cases.name: One-off root-level document should stay out of scope
cases.prompt: Draft a root-level architecture memo for this repository.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This should not route to project-documentation because the task is a one-off root-level doc, not docs-set governance.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should explain the docs-set boundary clearly.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should avoid treating broad one-off document drafting as docs/ governance.

cases.name: Docs diff review should stay with review
cases.prompt: Review this PR's documentation changes and call out regressions.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This should stay with review because the task is change-set review, not docs governance.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should distinguish docs verification from PR or diff review.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should point to the review workflow.

cases.name: Research-heavy request should not route here
cases.prompt: Research the latest Kubernetes ingress best practices and write a citation-backed report.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This should not route to project-documentation because the primary deliverable is deep external research.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should keep research-first work outside this skill boundary.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should point to deep-research rather than docs governance.

cases.name: Document conversion should stay out of scope
cases.prompt: Convert this PDF handbook to Markdown and keep the tables intact.

routing_verdict_correct.check: This should not route to project-documentation because the primary task is format conversion.

mode_or_boundary_correct.check: The response should explain that conversion is a different workflow from docs governance.

repo_grounding_or_handoff_explicit.check: The response should hand off to a document-conversion workflow.
